tagline: Genie Code space configuration: Genie Code now includes tools to configure your Genie Space.
what_it_does: Genie Code space configuration: Genie Code now includes tools to configure your Genie Space. You can ask it to update instructions, example questions, descriptions, and more.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Genie Code space configuration: Genie Code now includes tools to configure your Genie Space.
